div.class: laundry-dashboard-header d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-3 px-3 py-3 border-bottom bg-view

div.div: Monitor orders, payments and daily activity

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fs-1 text-primary mb-3

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex flex-column align-items-center text-center py-4

button.class: laundry-kpi-card card border-0 shadow-sm w-100 h-100 text-start
laundry-kpi-card card border-0 shadow-sm w-100 h-100 text-start
laundry-kpi-card card border-0 shadow-sm w-100 h-100 text-start

div.div: Select a status to filter orders

button.t-att-class: state.selectedStatusId === status.id ? 'laundry-status-card btn w-100 text-start p-3 active' : 'laundry-status-card btn w-100 text-start p-3'

div.class: laundry-empty-icon d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle bg-primary-subtle text-primary mb-3

div.div: No laundry orders match the current search or filters.
